source_pr.title: *: use pdqsort to sort and remove BCE
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: Weizhen Wang <wangweizhen@pingcap.com>

<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: ref #34250

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

- use pdqsort to improve sort performance
- remove less function in sort to remove BCE so that it can improve performance too.
### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [x] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR is a broad performance-oriented refactor (use pdqsort / remove BCE) touching multiple components and updating tests accordingly. The available case evidence does not provide a specific flaky failure signature or a targeted stabilization fix for an intermittent failure.
fix_pattern: Refactor sorting implementations (pdqsort / BCE-related changes) across multiple packages; update related tests/build configs.

evidence: files: ddl/db_test.go, ddl/label/rule.go, distsql/select_result.go, domain/schema_validator.go, planner/core/exhaust_physical_plans.go, planner/core/memtable_predicate_extractor.go, planner/core/stats.go, planner/funcdep/fast_int_set_test.go, session/schema_amender_test.go, store/mockstore/unistore/tikv/util.go, testkit/testutil/handle.go, util/execdetails/execdetails.go
